action.reasoning:
Observation: train.py default backbone arg is 'clip_vit_b16' which is wrong. Need to fix to 'vit_base_patch16_clip_224.openai'. Best.pt is at 21.17% Quickdraw with 5 epochs. Have 9.7h, 16 iters left.

Analysis: Fix backbone arg, run more training with stronger sketch augs (resume from best.pt). 5 epochs took ~12.5min. I have plenty of budget for 8-10 more epochs. Let me also use lower LR for fine-tuning since we already have strong source acc, focus on reducing source bias.

Decision: Fix backbone default, train 8 more epochs resuming from best.pt with strong sketch aug, evaluate.
action.command: bash fix_args.sh && grep -n backbone train.py | head -5 && torchrun --nproc_per_node=4 --master_port=29502 train.py --epochs 8 --batch_size 96 --lr_backbone 5e-6 --lr_head 5e-4 --workers 8 --resume checkpoints/best.pt

command_output.stdout:
111:    model = Classifier(backbone=args.backbone, num_classes=345, pretrained=True).cuda(rank)
121:    backbone_params = [p for n,p in model.named_parameters() if 'head' not in n]
124:        {'params': backbone_params, 'lr': args.lr_backbone, 'weight_decay': 0.05},
196:    ap.add_argument('--backbone', default='vit_base_patch16_clip_224.openai')
200:    ap.add_argument('--lr_backbone', type=float, default=1e-5)
